subject: Fix 3D view to show OSM map tiles instead of grid-only
description: Modify AlignmentOsm3DViewer in AlignmentPage.tsx to composite OSM raster tiles onto an offscreen canvas, apply as Three.js CanvasTexture on the ground plane, so the 3D scene shows a real map beneath the building model and anchor markers.
activeForm: Implementing OSM tile texture in 3D view
